title: KeyPackage re-published on every UserJoined: O(N²) per session
description: On every UserJoined event, every connected client re-publishes its MLS key package. With N clients connected, each new join triggers N PublishKeyPackage messages. A room with 16 clients joining sequentially generates 16+15+14+...+1 = 136 key package publishes instead of 16. The relay stores and broadcasts KeyPackageReady for each, and all other clients process N² notifications. This is not a hard bug today (small N), but it is a repeating inefficiency baked in to the join flow. Maintenance consequence: as N grows this becomes the first user-visible slowdown on connect; will generate performance issue reports.
close_reason: nie-8le.5: Added 'MLS Admin Election Invariant' section to CLAUDE.md with explicit rules about online[0], partition_point insertion, and what must not be changed. nie-8le.6: Guard UserJoined KP republication with \!mls_active — members already in the group need not republish since the admin already holds their KP; reduces O(N²) publishes per session to near-O(1).
